raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A generic request to check a protocol-description artifact centrally includes verifying whether the stated safety and failure-tolerance reasoning is internally coherent.","R1.3":"The artifact makes empirical performance and deployment claims, so checking whether those claims align with the reported numbers is centrally expected.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is prose, sentence-level clarity, grammar, and register are centrally implicated.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and does not name a specific checking mode.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid inflating the scope beyond what a generic check of the provided artifact supports.","RX.3":"The projection must remain within responsibility assignment and not perform the requested check itself.","RX.4":"The projection must account for avoiding downstream harm from overconfident validation of a technical protocol or empirical claim.","RX.5":"The projection must remain traceable to the delegation wording and the specific claims present in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A generic request to check a protocol-description artifact centrally includes verifying whether the stated safety and failure-tolerance reasoning is internally coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes empirical performance and deployment claims, so checking whether those claims align with the reported numbers is centrally expected.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is prose, sentence-level clarity, grammar, and register are centrally implicated.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and does not name a specific checking mode.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid inflating the scope beyond what a generic check of the provided artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must remain within responsibility assignment and not perform the requested check itself.
rationale.RX.4: The projection must account for avoiding downstream harm from overconfident validation of a technical protocol or empirical claim.
rationale.RX.5: The projection must remain traceable to the delegation wording and the specific claims present in the artifact.
